zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Pakenham於1306年3月20日出生在英國素福爾可帕克南時，他的父親Robert Pakenham27歲，母親Julia Agnes Hull20歲。他去世於1376年9月20日在他的家鄉享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pakenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pakenham (Suffolk). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Pacca (genitive Paccan) + hām ‘village, homestead’.
History: A family of this name has been established in Westmeath, Ireland, since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Pakenham was born on 20 March 1306, in Pakenham, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Pakenham, was 27 and his mother, Julia Agnes Hull, was 20. He died on 20 September 1376, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Pakenham est né le 20 mars 1306, à Pakenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Pakenham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Julia Agnes Hull, avait 20 ans. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1376, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Pakenham am 20. März 1306 in Pakenham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Pakenham 27 und seine Mutter Julia Agnes Hull 20. Er starb am 20. September 1376 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Pakenham è nato il il 20 marzo 1306 nel Pakenham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Pakenham, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Julia Agnes Hull, aveva 20 anni. Morì il 20 settembre 1376, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Pakenham(이)가 1306년 3월 20일 영국 수폴크 팍함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Pakenham(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Julia Agnes Hull(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1376년 9월 20일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Pakenham nasceu em 20 de março de 1306, em Pakenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Pakenham, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Julia Agnes Hull, tinha 20 anos. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1376, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Pakenham родился 20 марта 1306 г. в местности пеикенам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Pakenham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Julia Agnes Hull, 20. Он умер 20 сентября 1376 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.
